scripts.build: pnpm --filter @turnkeyai/involute-shared build && pnpm --filter @turnkeyai/involute-server build && pnpm exec tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @turnkeyai/involute-shared build && pnpm --filter @turnkeyai/involute-server build && pnpm exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @turnkeyai/involute-shared build && pnpm --filter @turnkeyai/involute-server build && pnpm exec vitest --config vitest.config.ts --passWithNoTests
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @turnkeyai/involute-shared build && pnpm --filter @turnkeyai/involute-server build && pnpm exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
